docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BARBARA ANSCHER FILED BY AUTORETURN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2009 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
